title: gold_set_index
description: Curated list of historical pieces designated for retrieval benchmarks, rubrics, and evaluation (SPEC §9.5). Join key aligns with piece_docx_metadata_record.relative_to_repo.

gold_set_version.description: Monotonic label for this index document (date or semver).

taxonomy_version.description: Editorial archetype taxonomy bundle expected when primary_archetype_id is set (default v1 in tooling).

piece_relative_to_repo.description: Stable path under the repo root, same field as metadata extraction.

primary_archetype_id.description: Optional id from bundled editorial_archetype_taxonomy; validated in library code.
